title: Oaths and acknowledgments
doc_html:
§3.  Oaths and acknowledgments

Oaths and acknowledgments, in all cases, may be taken or made by or before any notary public duly appointed and qualified in this state.
doc_text:
§3.  Oaths and acknowledgments
Oaths and acknowledgments, in all cases, may be taken or made by or before any notary public duly appointed and qualified in this state.
